level2.caption: A group of women in patterned garments stand close together, creating a colorful and detailed scene.

level3.caption: A group of women in patterned garments stand close together in Japan, showcasing traditional clothes.

level4.caption: A group of women in Japan wear colorful kimonos, traditional garments historically worn for both everyday life and special occasions, showcasing intricate patterns and elegant designs.

caption.caption: Two individuals stand side-by-side wearing traditional Japanese hakama pants and white tops, likely practicing or demonstrating a martial art like aikido.

level2.caption: Two people are standing next to each other wearing wide-legged pants and light-colored shirts.

level3.caption: In Japan, two individuals are dressed in traditional clothing consisting of wide-legged bottoms and light-colored tops.

level4.caption: In Japan, two individuals are dressed in traditional hakama, wide-legged formal trousers historically worn by samurai and now often seen during martial arts practice or special ceremonies.

caption.caption: A close-up shot displays a small white bowl filled with natto, a traditional Japanese food made from fermented soybeans, often served with rice and seasonings.

level2.caption: A small white bowl is filled with a dark, textured food served as a meal.

level3.caption: A popular Japanese cuisine features a savory, dark-colored topping served in a small bowl as a quick and satisfying meal.

level4.caption: A bowl of gyudon, a popular and affordable Japanese dish featuring thinly sliced beef simmered in a savory-sweet sauce and served over rice, offers a quick and satisfying meal.

caption.caption: A traditional Japanese shrine building stands nestled among lush greenery, showcasing intricate wooden architecture and a serene atmosphere.

level2.caption: A small wooden structure with a layered roof stands on a stone base surrounded by trees and foliage.

level3.caption: This Japanese architecture is a small, traditional wooden structure built on a stone foundation and nestled amongst lush greenery.

level4.caption: This Setsumatsusha, a small Shinto shrine often erected to mark boundaries or purify a location, features traditional wooden construction and a stone base, reflecting its role in safeguarding a specific area within the landscape.

caption.caption: A street vendor in Japan displays and sells traditional artwork and souvenirs to a small group of onlookers.

level2.caption: A vendor showcases artwork and souvenirs to a small group of people outdoors.

level3.caption: In Japan, a performer presents a visual story and small gifts to an audience gathered around a portable stage.

level4.caption: In Japan, a performer uses a *kamishibai*, a portable paper drama stage with illustrated story cards, to entertain an audience while offering small gifts, a popular form of street performance during the mid-20th century.
